evidence_summary: /opusworkflow skill exists and documents the definitive Opus/MiniMax workflow
setup.sh defaults to opusworkflow while preserving --mode overrides
the wrapper prepares workflow-mode opusminimax artifacts with outer_route, inner_contract, outcome_policy, provider_ceiling=1, effective_concurrency=1, and plan_mode.policy=auto
plan-mode auto-approval records auto_approved_when_gates_pass only after research, audit, pre-plan introspection, estimate, SPEC, and Spec QA gates pass
agentfactory and hiveworkflow inner contracts inherit the OpusWorkflow provider split by default
docs and release/eval surfaces discover the route
